famous quote:
"No man knows how bad he is till he has tried very hard to be good. A silly idea is current that good people do not know what temptation means. This is an obvious lie. Only those who try to resist temptation know how strong it is. After all, you find out the strength of the German army by fighting against it, not by giving in. You find out the strength of a wind by trying to walk against it, not by lying down. A man who gives in to temptation after five minutes simply does not know what it would have been like an hour later. That is why bad people, in one sense, know very little about badness -- they have lived a sheltered life by always giving in. We never find out the strength of the evil impulse inside us until we try to fight it: and Christ, because He was the only man who never yielded to temptation, is also the only man who knows to the full what temptation means -- the only complete realist."
-- C.S. Lewis
Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 7)

After 2 years of hearing (from her church) that what she was hearing from the Lord was too outspoken, she's relearning what it's like to listen to the voice and not be afraid to speak. 

Hannah went to a mom's prayer night for their new church not too long prior to our interview. 8 or 9 people were in the room. They were all just exhausted and heavy. They were praying and worshiping. Hannah thought, "This is a heavy room." She went to Alyssa, the organizer, and told her. Alyssa said go up there and encourage people. Hannah had the shakes so bad because she hadn't done that in 4 years. Immediately the lies came up that said 'you don't know what you're talking about, or 'this is stupid.' I got up there and said, "I want to encourage you all. You don't need to do anything. You can let the pressure off." Then one after another people got up and spoke. Alyssa called Hannah later and said if she hadn't done that people wouldn't have gotten to open up and share either.
 
God was patient about teaching Hannah to start doing things again. At some point God told her, "You can take the training wheels off again." She hopes that in the coming years the church remembers to do that again. If we don't exercise those muscles again, there are some big parts of the body that won't function.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine this as the type of longing we have for God, and the torture of not being fully satisfied to know him on this side of heaven.
